name: RP2040 BLE Component
description: The `rp2040_ble` component in ESPHome sets up the Bluetooth LE stack on RP2040 and RP2350 devices using the [BTstack](https://github.com/bluekitchen/btstack) library provided by the [arduino-pico](https://github.com/earlephilhower/arduino-pico) framework.

config_entries.label: Enable On Boot
config_entries.description: If enabled, the BLE interface will be enabled on boot. Defaults to `true`.
